contracts.summary: Search governed requirements and prior evidence, identify propagation gaps, and produce a remediation contract with follow-up scope.
compiler_steps: rank related incidents, requirements, and prior fixes
compile remediation plan and follow-up work items

contracts.summary: Bind incident history and review target, then compile governed findings, risks, and follow-up checks.
compiler_steps: map prior failure modes onto the target
compile findings, risk statements, and follow-up checks

contracts.summary: Run a governed benchmark-driven experiment loop with baseline, one bounded change, rerun, and keep or discard evidence.
compiler_steps: compile rerun and keep or discard evidence
